purpose: Context packet and adjudication output schema for LLM adjudication of ~171 ambiguous_residual rows

input_packet.description: One JSON object per ambiguous_residual row. Self-contained. LLM needs no external lookups.

parsed_description.notes: From parsed guide AoS section. Include even if empty string. Omit field only if course does not appear in AoS (SP-only row with no AoS description).

aos_group_neighbors.notes: Other courses in the same AoS group that have been resolved. Shows the typical code generation for this section.

candidates.notes: All candidate course codes with full canonical metadata. Do NOT include cert/prereq mentions or raw observed_titles.

previously_resolved_in_guide.notes: Sample of resolved rows from anywhere in the same guide. Establishes the code cohort pattern for this guide.

signals_checked_and_failed.notes: All deterministic signals that were checked and did not resolve this row. Prevents LLM from re-discovering an already-failed signal.

output_adjudication.description: One JSON object per packet. The LLM writes this for each row adjudicated.

selected_code.notes: Canonical course code selected. null if unresolvable.

definitions.high: Clear single answer; confident a reader with full WGU context would agree. Requires at least one named specific evidence point.
definitions.medium: Likely correct but one or more candidates cannot be fully ruled out.
definitions.low: Weak evidence; real risk of being wrong. Do not auto-accept.
definitions.unresolvable: Candidates are genuinely indistinguishable. Do not select.

alternative_possible.notes: true if an alternative candidate could plausibly be correct with different interpretation of the same evidence. Triggers spot-check even for high confidence.

rationale.notes: 2-5 sentences. Must cite specific evidence (field names, values, edition ranges, program texts). Must explain why alternatives were excluded.

signal_used.notes: Primary evidence type. Use 'other' and explain in rationale if none of the named signals apply.

unresolvable_reason.notes: If confidence = unresolvable: brief description of why no selection is possible. null otherwise.

review_flag.notes: true if this adjudication should be manually reviewed regardless of confidence level.

batching_strategy.within_group_order: AoS rows before SP rows; 2-candidate rows before 3+ candidate rows
batching_strategy.rationale: Grouping by family allows the LLM to learn the code cohort pattern for a program family and apply it consistently across many similar rows.
